mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals tightening labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE declines below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and consumer prices (CPIAUCSL) indicates inflationary demand pressures that prompt central banks to maintain restrictive policies, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns exceed -1.5% in 40%+ of instances where both GDPC1 and CPIAUCSL meet the trigger thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 112.3227 signals strengthening manufacturing activity that drives equity risk premiums higher, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 112.3227.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent monetary tightening (FEDFUNDS > 5%) combined with declining consumer spending (RSAFS) creates a recessionary risk environment that depresses equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns exceed -1.0% in 30%+ of instances where both FEDFUNDS and RSAFS meet the trigger thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained monthly increase in payroll employment (PAYEMS) above 136,214 thousand signals robust labor market conditions that support corporate profit growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 50%+ of months with PAYEMS growth above 136,214.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in housing starts (HOUST) above 1,588 thousand indicates strengthening demand for residential construction, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 40%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 1588.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) indicates a synchronized supply-side expansion and labor market tightening that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns exceed -2.0% in 35%+ of instances where both INDPRO and UNRATE meet the trigger thresholds.
